zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengarde Bidun於大約1166年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登時，她的父親John de Bidun40歲，母親Alice Mauduit34歲。她於大約1194年與Adulf de Gatesden在英國越可爾科比結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1240年享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bidun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): habitational name, probably from Baydon (Wiltshire). The placename may have meant ‘hill associated with a woman named Bēage’ (a personal name derived from Old English bēag ‘ring, bracelet, torque’ + Old English dūn). The surname is pronounced /'baidən/.

History: The surname Biden has a long history in East Meon (Hampshire), recorded there from 1327 until at least the 1840s. — Joe Biden, the 46th president of the US, is of Irish, English, and French descent. His mother’s Jean (Catherine Eugenia) Finnegan entire family tree traces back to Ireland, with some of the ancestors named Blewitt (see Blewett ).

variants.name: Blewett
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French bleuet, blouet ‘bluish’, a diminutive of bleu ‘blue’, more specifically ‘pale, pallid, wan’, or ‘fair-haired, golden-haired’. Compare Blew , Blewitt , and Bluett .

History: The Norman Ralph Bloet is mentioned in Domesday Book (1086) as lord of the manor of Hinton in Hampshire, recorded in 1246 as Henton Bluet (modern Hinton Blewett). From the late 12th century onward many Anglo-Norman knights acquired estates in Ireland. Ralph's presumed descendants, Thomas and Ralph Bluet, held lands in counties Cork and Limerick before and after 1254, and are ancestors of the modern Irish families named Bluett, Blewett, and Blewitt. In 1850, following the Irish Potato Famine in Ireland (1845–49), Patrick Blewitt, a son of Edward Blewitt of Ballina, County Mayo, migrated to North America, his whole family joining him in 1851 to settle in Scranton PA. Joe Biden (see Biden ), the 46th president of the US, is Edward's great-great-great grandson.

nameMeanings.name: Ermengarde

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengarde Bidun was born about 1166, in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, John de Bidun, was 40 and her mother, Alice Mauduit, was 34. She married Adulf de Gatesden about 1194, in Kirby, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died about 1240, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengarde Bidun est née environ 1166, à Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Bidun, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Alice Mauduit, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Adulf de Gatesden environ 1194, à Kirby, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1240, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengarde Bidunが約1166年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドンで生まれた時，父John de Bidunは40歳，母Alice Mauduitは34歳であった。約1194年にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビーでAdulf de Gatesdenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1240年に76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermengarde Bidun(이)가 대략 1166년 영국 벅잉함실르 레이븐던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Bidun(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Mauduit(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1194년 영국 요르크실르 커비에서 Adulf de Gatesden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 76세의 나이로 사망했다.
